recipe.title: Quick falafel
recipe.description: Jamie's falafel recipe is quick, easy, and full of flavour and texture – give it a go

steps.descr: Drain the chickpeas and put them into a food processor
steps.instructions: Drain the chickpeas and put them into a food processor.

on_enter.say: Drain the chickpeas and put them into a food processor.

steps.descr: Finely grate in the lemon zest, then add a pinch of sea...
steps.instructions: Finely grate in the lemon zest, then add a pinch of sea salt and black pepper, the harissa, allspice, flour and coriander stalks (reserving the leaves for the Coriander & lemon yoghurt, or tasty cooking another day). Blitz until smooth, scraping down the sides of the processor if needed.

on_enter.say: Finely grate in the lemon zest, then add a pinch of sea salt and black pepper, the harissa, allspice, flour and coriander stalks (reserving the leaves for the Coriander & lemon yoghurt, or tasty cooking another day). Blitz until smooth, scraping down the sides of the processor if needed.

steps.descr: Scrape out the mixture and use clean, wet hands to...
steps.instructions: Scrape out the mixture and use clean, wet hands to quickly divide and shape it into 16 patties.

on_enter.say: Scrape out the mixture and use clean, wet hands to quickly divide and shape it into 16 patties.

steps.descr: Drizzle 2 tablespoons of olive oil into a large...
steps.instructions: Drizzle 2 tablespoons of olive oil into a large non-stick frying pan on a medium heat. Carefully lay in the falafels and cook for 6 minutes, or until golden and crisp, turning halfway.

on_enter.say: Drizzle 2 tablespoons of olive oil into a large non-stick frying pan on a medium heat. Carefully lay in the falafels and cook for 6 minutes, or until golden and crisp, turning halfway.

steps.descr: Warm the pittas in the oven or toast them directly over...
steps.instructions: Warm the pittas in the oven or toast them directly over the flame of a gas hob, using tongs to turn them over.

on_enter.say: Warm the pittas in the oven or toast them directly over the flame of a gas hob, using tongs to turn them over.

steps.descr: Load the falafels into warm pitta breads with your...
steps.instructions: Load the falafels into warm pitta breads with your favourite toppings (see below), then pick over the mint leaves, to serve.

on_enter.say: Load the falafels into warm pitta breads with your favourite toppings (see below), then pick over the mint leaves, to serve.
